title: cgraph advisory telemetry-log row
description: One JSONL row in .btrain/logs/cgraph-advisories.jsonl. Append-only telemetry for every advisory surfacing and resolution transition across the lane lifecycle. Consumed by replay and adoption analysis; row shape is a strict superset of the shared advisory-core fields.

event.description: Transition type. 'surfaced' = first write after a new (lane, kind, context_hash) appeared. 'resolved' = previously-live entry cleared because the underlying condition changed or the lane resolved.

recorded_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this row was written.

lane.description: Lane id this advisory was pinned to.

kind.description: Taxonomy label (e.g. lock_overlap, drift, stale_index, packet_truncated).

context_hash.description: Short sha256 prefix identifying the underlying context. (lane, kind, context_hash) is stable between the 'surfaced' and 'resolved' rows for one advisory instance.

detail.description: One-line explanation captured at surface time; preserved on 'resolved' rows so the log is self-contained.

suggestion.description: Actionable next step captured at surface time. May be empty.

advisory_id.description: Stable advise-situation id when available, empty otherwise.
